description.value:
You scribe your thoughts onto one or more scrolls at a distance by sending delicate manipulations of Chakra towards them. You may decide to target any number of blank scrolls (up to 1 per level) by spending an additional 2 Chakra per scroll beyond the first. You must know the exact location of each scroll, and must have made physical contact with it within the last 8 hours. For a scroll to receive information, it must be laid open, and there must be an open path for the Chakra to reach it (a very small hole would suffice).

Each round you concentrate, you can burn up to one page's worth of information into the scrolls (one page is the equivalent of 250 words). You may only transmit writing or very basic visual patterns (such as a simple floorplan). A faint orange glow accompanies the writing, as your words are burned into the page. The information is permanent and cannot be erased (save by destroying the entire scroll).

Concentrating on this technique provokes attacks of opportunity.

Creatures that can See (Through) Chakra will see tendrils of Chakra emanating from you towards the scrolls, allowing them to get a general sense of which direction the scrolls are.
